summary: Deployed 2 zo.space API routes: /api/career-hotline-stripe (Stripe webhook — handles checkout.session.completed, credits minutes by phone if available, logs unclaimed purchases if no phone, notifies V via SMS) and /api/career-hotline-claim (manual claim endpoint — POST with phone + stripe_session_id to claim unclaimed purchases). Product-to-minutes mapping hardcoded for 3 tiers. Idempotent event processing. E.164 phone normalization.
broadcast: Stripe webhook live at va.zo.space/api/career-hotline-stripe. Claim endpoint at va.zo.space/api/career-hotline-claim. Product IDs mapped: prod_Tydna1JD56E7UP=30m, prod_TydnR6AzMThQA0=60m, prod_TydnzjPvIuRHRg=120m. Phone normalization uses E.164. V needs to configure Stripe webhook in dashboard pointing to https://va.zo.space/api/career-hotline-stripe for checkout.session.completed events.
